paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026. Additionally, there are recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K form announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.

There have been recent insider filings, including one Form 4 filing, and social media activity, with one new post in the last 24 hours, stating "$FRMI Took some off here at 6.80 followers 30% trimmed. Nice trade so far". The company has also filed other forms, including a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K forms, which are available in the filings feed.
